name: NIH Common Fund Human Virome Program (HVP)
mission: Characterize the healthy human virome and its role in human health and disease.
goals: Catalog human viruses across diverse populations and life stages
Develop tools, models, and methods to detect and characterize viruses
Study interactions between the virome and human and microbial hosts
Coordinate, manage, and share program-generated data
note: Synthesized by the Handley Lab. Independent perspective, not an official HVP product.
